creator: rnejdl@ringofsaturn.com
text:
On 2012-01-24 18:30, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of mail/assp,
>
> Please note that PR ports/164451 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/164451

Edwin,

That was me submitting the patch so yes, I do approve it.  Sorry for 
not fixing the email address in the send-pr program before hitting 
submit.

Sincerely,
Rusty Nejdl
